Driver and SPI communication functions for the BMI160 IMU, with configuration and register definitions.


## Files
- **[bmi160.c](bmi160.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the BMI160 IMU, including functions for accelerometer and gyroscope configuration, data reading, and interrupt handling.
- **[bmi160.h](bmi160.h.md)**: Header file for BMI160 IMU driver, defining power modes and initialization functions.
- **[bmi160_private.h](bmi160_private.h.md)**: Functions for SPI communication and register operations with the BMI160 sensor.
- **[bmi160_regs.h](bmi160_regs.h.md)**: Defines register addresses and configurations for the BMI160 sensor in the Pebble firmware.
- **[bmi160_spi.c](bmi160_spi.c.md)**: SPI communication functions for the BMI160 sensor, including register read and write operations.
